wave_conflicts.note: All three Wave 3 tasks modify strings.xml (Task 8 and 9 explicitly say 'дополнить'). Parallel execution -> merge conflict. Fix: either (a) seed all strings in Task 7, (b) split strings per feature-file (strings_model_manager.xml, strings_chat.xml), or (c) serialize the tasks.

Task 7 creates MainActivity.kt; Task 10 updates its setContent. Both in Wave 3. Task 10 depends on Task 7's output and also modifies the same file. Move Task 10 to a later sub-wave or merge setContent wiring into Task 7.

issues.issue: T-R5 in Risks section contains an inline self-correction ('удаляю kotlinx-serialization-json и плагин serialization из Dependencies') but the Dependencies section still lists both `kotlinx-serialization-json:1.7.3` and `org.jetbrains.kotlin.plugin.serialization:2.2.0`. Contradiction between sections.
issues.fix: Physically remove kotlinx-serialization-json and the serialization plugin from Dependencies section (or withdraw the T-R5 decision). Cross-update User-Spec Deviations extension note.

issues.issue: Decision T6 contains a multi-line Kotlin code fence in the Decisions section. Acceptable but atypical — decisions are usually prose.
issues.fix: Optional: move snippet to the task file, keep prose in Decisions.

issues.issue: All T-decisions correctly anchored to user-spec, architecture.md, or marked [TECHNICAL] (T4). No missing anchors.
